data.raceName: AUSSIE PET & ANIMAL TRAVEL 5TH GRADE HT2
data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. PHOENIX SILVER stuck on well last time to finish one length back in second (28.90) at this track in a Grade 4/5 over 498m. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last start. Likely to feature again. 2. JOSH'S JET is better than last start when fifth (22.25) from Box 8 at this track over 380m. Comes through a solid form race last start. Likely to be about the money. 1. SHERYL is boxed nicely on the inside. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 380m at this track behind Aussie Audi beaten 6 lengths (22.34). Suited here and expected to run well. 6. HE PLAYED ONE missed the placings here most recently but can sneak into the finish with the right run.","runners":[8,2,1,6],"exclusive":false}
